releaseNotes: Adds an optional designBrief block to the Design Room state schema, seeded from ui-ux-pro-max guidance (reference-only) and rendered in the Design Room.
Adds the seed:design-brief advisory helper that derives a ui-ux-pro-max query from positioning/audience without calling external tools.
Adds the check:template-safety gate that fails CI if framer-motion/motion imports leak into shipped template code (web-only library; mobile uses DesignTokens.Motion).
